title: CTM Spoke Infrastructure Manifest
description: Machine-readable source of truth for a spoke's Azure infrastructure. Consumed by workflow-agentic-infra-builder to generate Terraform HCL and deploy landing zones.

name.description: Spoke short name (used in resource naming). e.g. ctm-intelligence

infra_repo.description: GitHub repo name for generated Terraform.

sku_mode.description: SKU tier strategy. premium = prod-equivalent at smallest size.

management_group_id.description: Short management group ID for subscription placement.

ctm_properties.description: Shared CTM naming properties applied to all resources in this spoke.

product.description: Product code used in CTM naming convention. e.g. ctmi, gprof, lb

environments.description: Environment definitions. Keys are environment names (dev, uat, prod, etc.).

tags.description: Governance tags applied to all resources via terraform-azurerm-tags. Values may contain '[TBD]' placeholders.

CostRegion.description: Cost allocation region. Azure policy enforced.

CostType.description: Cost allocation type. Azure policy enforced.

blockers.description: Known blockers, red flags, and gaps. Workflow rejects deployment if any severity=HIGH remain OPEN.

tbd_string.description: A string that may be '[TBD]' â€” workflow validates and blocks deployment if any remain.

module_ref.description: CTM module name from the private registry. e.g. terraform-azurerm-linux-web-app

resource_ref.description: Cross-resource reference resolved to module.<id>.<attr> during HCL generation. e.g. $ref:rg.resource_id

location.description: Azure region for this environment.

location_secondary.description: Secondary Azure region for dual-region deployments.

overrides.description: Deep-merged onto resource defaults for this environment. Keys match resource IDs, values are partial resource configs.

network_block.description: Networking configuration. Minimal: just vnet_cidr. Builder auto-carves subnets, NSGs, PEs, DNS zones from networking-defaults.yml.

vnet_cidr.description: VNet CIDR block. Builder auto-generates subnets from this.

peering.description: Hub VNet to peer with. e.g. hub-network-vnet

dns_servers.description: DNS servers. 'hub-inherited' or list of IPs.

cross_spoke_peerings.description: Cross-spoke VNet peerings using native azurerm resources (conditional on remote VNet vars).

dns_zone_cross_spoke_links.description: Cross-spoke DNS zone VNet links (conditional on target VNet vars).

id.description: Logical ID used in $ref references and HCL module name.

peering.description: Hub VNet peering target. e.g. hub-network-vnet

name.description: Azure subnet name override. Defaults to the id if omitted. Use for names Azure requires (e.g. GatewaySubnet).

subsystem.description: Subsystem override for NSG naming. If omitted, derived from id by stripping nsg_ prefix.

subnet_id.description: Logical ID of the subnet this NSG attaches to.

target_resource_id.description: $ref to the target resource or literal resource ID.

sub_resource.description: Sub-resource type. e.g. postgresqlServer, vault, registry

subnet_id.description: Logical ID of the PE subnet.

zone_name.description: Private DNS zone FQDN. e.g. privatelink.postgres.database.azure.com

linked_vnets.description: VNet IDs to link this zone to.

subnet_ids.description: Logical IDs of subnets to associate.

vnet_id.description: Logical ID of the local VNet.

remote_vnet_id.description: Logical ID of the remote VNet.

vnet_id.description: Logical ID of the local VNet.

remote_vnet_var.description: Variable name for remote VNet ID.

dns_zone_id.description: Logical ID of the DNS zone.

target_vnet_var.description: Variable name for the target VNet ID.

plan_defaults.description: Default plan specs. plan_strategy controls ASP assignment: 'dedicated' (default, 1 per app), 'shared' (auto-group N apps per plan), or omit for dedicated.

plan_strategy.description: dedicated = 1 ASP per app (default). shared = auto-group apps_per_plan apps onto each ASP.

apps_per_plan.description: Number of apps per shared ASP (only used when plan_strategy = shared).

plan_strategy.description: dedicated = 1 ASP per app (default). shared = auto-group apps_per_plan apps onto each ASP.

apps_per_plan.description: Number of apps per shared ASP (only used when plan_strategy = shared).

sku.description: SKU name. e.g. P1v3, B1, S1, EP1

asp_id.description: Logical ID of the App Service Plan. Omit when using plan_defaults.

plan_id.description: Explicit ASP to place this app on (from compute.app_service_plans). Overrides plan_defaults and share_plan_with.

share_plan_with.description: ID of another app to share its plan.

plan_override.description: Override plan_defaults for this app only.

resource_group.description: Override RG placement. Creates rg-{product}-{value}-{env}-{loc}. Default: compute RG (databases auto-isolate by type).

location.description: Override default location for this resource.

managed_identities.description: Managed identity configuration. system_assigned defaults to true. user_assigned lists MI module IDs from security.managed_identities.

user_assigned.description: List of managed identity module IDs (e.g. mi_azure-functions) to attach.

asp_id.description: Logical ID of ASP. Omit when using plan_defaults.

plan_id.description: Explicit ASP to place this app on (from compute.app_service_plans). Overrides plan_defaults and share_plan_with.

share_plan_with.description: ID of another app to share its plan.

plan_override.description: Override plan_defaults for this app only.

resource_group.description: Override RG placement. Creates rg-{product}-{value}-{env}-{loc}. Default: compute RG (databases auto-isolate by type).

location.description: Override default location for this resource.

managed_identities.description: Managed identity configuration. system_assigned defaults to true. user_assigned lists MI module IDs from security.managed_identities.

user_assigned.description: List of managed identity module IDs (e.g. mi_azure-functions) to attach.

resource_group.description: Override RG placement. Creates rg-{product}-{value}-{env}-{loc}. Default: compute RG (databases auto-isolate by type).

location.description: Override default location for this resource.

storage_registrations.description: Azure Files shares registered with the CAE for volume mounting by Container Apps.

name.description: Logical name used to reference this storage from Container App volumes.

storage_account_id.description: Logical ID of the storage account in the manifest.

share_name.description: Name of the Azure Files share.

resource_group.description: Override RG placement. Creates rg-{product}-{value}-{env}-{loc}. Default: compute RG (databases auto-isolate by type).

location.description: Override default location for this resource.

cae_id.description: Logical ID of the Container App Environment.

persistent_volumes.description: Persistent volumes mounted from CAE-registered Azure Files shares.

name.description: Volume name within the Container App template.

cae_storage_name.description: Name of the CAE storage registration to mount.

mount_path.description: Absolute path inside the container where the volume is mounted.

location.description: Override default location for this resource.

pgbouncer_enabled.description: Enable PgBouncer connection pooling (PG Flexible Server only).

databases.description: Database names to create within the server.

zone.description: Availability zone for the database server.

resource_group.description: Override RG placement. Creates rg-{product}-{value}-{env}-{loc}. Default: compute RG (databases auto-isolate by type).

location.description: Override default location for this resource.

capacity_mode.description: Database capacity mode. Cosmos supports serverless.

azure_resource_name.description: Override naming convention with explicit Azure name.

location.description: Override default location for this resource.

purge_protection_enabled.description: Irreversible once enabled. Prevents permanent deletion of the Key Vault.

bypass_naming_convention.description: Use the name field directly instead of generated naming convention.

name.description: Custom resource name (only used when bypass_naming_convention is true).

platform_block.description: Platform-level resources that require the azapi provider (non-standard Azure resource types).

azapi_resource.description: An Azure resource managed via the azapi provider for resource types not covered by azurerm.

id.description: Logical ID used in HCL resource name.

name.description: Azure resource name. If omitted, uses the id.

parent_id.description: $ref to parent resource ID (typically resource group). Defaults to module.rg.resource_id

properties.description: Resource-specific properties. $ref values are resolved to module references.

hub_block.description: Hub-specific configuration. When present, triggers hub-mode generation with provider aliases, VPN gateway, peerings, and spoke DNS links.

spoke_connections.description: Spoke subscriptions this hub peers to. Generates provider aliases + variables.

spoke_dns_links.description: When true, link ALL spoke VNets to ALL central DNS zones.

location.description: Override default location (Static Sites have limited region availability).
